finding_results.notes: Removed the fire-extinguisher combat beat. Raúl's group now carries only a pipe and pry bar, and the retreat leaves no extinguisher weaponization on the page.

finding_results.notes: Yuki's stabbing aftermath is no longer body-discovery-only. Noor now arrives during the last breaths, presses the wound, and stays through the physical shutdown.
The corridor victim is now identified as Ben Mercer before, during, and after the fatal blow so the death carries a name on the page.
Reduced chapter usage of 'fluorescent' to two instances.
Recast the chapter's parenthetical and interruption-heavy lines into commas and full sentences. The revised chapter contains no em-dash lines.
Removed Priya's impossible phone and replaced it with the pen already established in the meeting scene.

summary: Revised Chapter 4 to fix all packet findings: Viktor's opening now uses fresh procedural language; Yuki Kim's death is rendered on-page through Noor's witness of her final breaths; the first-floor breaker-cabinet confrontation is made tactically legible and names Ben Mercer as the second victim; the fire-extinguisher continuity break and Priya phone contradiction are removed; and chapter-level prose tics are reduced to two uses of 'fluorescent' and zero em-dash lines.
